reviews.review_description: It has a w name because it reminds me of something else 🤨🤨🤫

The dogs look really cute and realistic. It is relaxing to watch them run around. However, I found the commands did not work very well. I also wish you could interact with the dogs more. More breeds would be nice too. Also the dogs kept running outside my play zone  so I couldn't go after them. This free game makes me want a more extensive paid version with more features (basically a nintendogs equivalent in vr)
its a little hard to get the voice commend to work but I really love the game
